title: SwarmKitContract
description: An integration contract: the agreed interface between two (or more) applications, identified by id. A first-class artifact so a pipeline's stage `locks` reference real contracts (a checked, pickable vocabulary) instead of free strings — no typo'd lock silently fails to serialise two requirements. The contract is not executed; it makes lock ids real and carries which apps it binds. See design/details/contract-registry.md.

parties.description: The applications this contract binds (at least two) — what makes it a contract (an interface between apps). Drives the pipeline's contention/ownership display. App ids are free strings.

interface.description: Optional pointer to where the interface itself lives (an API/event schema). Not interpreted by core — documentation + a handle for reviewers.
